nodes.label: Retail Customer
nodes.description: Individual banking customer accessing via web and mobile

nodes.label: Corporate Client
nodes.description: Business customer using treasury and bulk-payment APIs

nodes.label: Bank Operator
nodes.description: Internal staff managing operations and support tickets

nodes.label: Core Banking Platform
nodes.description: Central microservices platform handling all banking domain logic

nodes.label: Access & Security
nodes.description: API gateway, authentication and authorisation for all inbound traffic

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Routes all external traffic, enforces rate limits and TLS termination

nodes.label: Auth Service
nodes.description: Identity & access management, issues JWT tokens via OIDC flow

nodes.label: Banking Services
nodes.description: Core financial domain — accounts, payments and card management

nodes.label: Accounts Service
nodes.description: Manages customer accounts, balances and statements

nodes.label: Payments Service
nodes.description: Processes domestic and cross-border payment instructions

nodes.label: Card Management
nodes.description: Issues and manages debit / credit cards, tokenisation

nodes.label: Risk & Compliance
nodes.description: Real-time fraud detection, regulatory reporting and AML controls

nodes.label: Fraud Detection
nodes.description: Real-time ML-based transaction risk scoring and blocking

nodes.label: Reporting Engine
nodes.description: Generates regulatory (PSD2, EBA) and management reports

nodes.label: Platform Infrastructure
nodes.description: Async messaging, notifications and persistent data stores shared across all services

nodes.label: Event Bus
nodes.description: Async domain-event streaming between all microservices

nodes.label: Notifications
nodes.description: Delivers push, SMS and e-mail alerts triggered by domain events

nodes.label: Accounts DB
nodes.description: Primary store for customer and account data

nodes.label: Transactions DB
nodes.description: Immutable append-only ledger of all financial transactions

nodes.label: Cache / Sessions
nodes.description: Session tokens, rate-limit counters and hot-path account data

nodes.label: Digital Channels
nodes.description: Customer-facing web portal and native mobile applications

nodes.label: Web Banking
nodes.description: Full-featured banking portal and admin console for browsers

nodes.label: iOS App
nodes.description: Native banking app for iPhone and iPad

nodes.label: Android App
nodes.description: Native banking app for Android phones and tablets

nodes.label: SWIFT Network
nodes.description: International interbank messaging for cross-border wire transfers

nodes.label: Card Networks
nodes.description: Visa and Mastercard payment authorisation and settlement

nodes.label: KYC / AML Provider
nodes.description: Identity verification and anti-money-laundering screening
